reason: Check that descriptor-driven computation is not retained as production authority.
Check RVV selected emission stays plugin/target-owned and bounded to finite binary families.
Check generated RVV source/header/object routes continue to use typed family ops and common EmitC authority.
Check selected emission plans and runtime ABI metadata remain IR-backed and fail closed on stale mirrors.
Check focused validation uses C++ tests, lit/FileCheck, diff check, and check-tianchenrv.
